title: System Type
description: Base schema for a system type catalog entry.

slug.description: Unique identifier for this component. Lowercase, underscores.

version.description: Balance version. New versions create new rows; old components keep their reference.

hp.description: Maximum hit points / life capacity. Cores use this as light-year capacity. Null for types without degradation.

footprint.description: Internal space consumed (m^3). Reduces cargo capacity.

rate.description: Per-time rate value (e.g., regeneration per hour).

mult_a.description: Multiplier A (meaning varies by component type).

mult_b.description: Multiplier B (meaning varies by component type).

mult_c.description: Multiplier C (meaning varies by component type).
